prerequisites: An active e-conomic accounting agreement with data to extract.
A free e-conomic developer agreement registered at the e-conomic Developer Network, used to create your app and obtain an App Secret Token.
An App Secret Token (app_secret_token), generated when you create your app and shown only once.
An Agreement Grant Token (agreement_grant_token), issued when an e-conomic agreement owner grants your app access to their accounting data via your app's installation URL.

authMethods.name: App Secret Token plus Agreement Grant Token
authMethods.summary: e-conomic authenticates every REST API request with two token headers: X-AppSecretToken carries the app_secret_token that identifies your app, and X-AgreementGrantToken carries the agreement_grant_token that authorizes access to a specific agreement's data. Provide both connector secret fields (agreement_grant_token and app_secret_token); requests also send Content-Type: application/json. For read-only exploration you can use the value 'demo' for both tokens, which restricts you to GET requests.

setupSteps.title: Register a developer agreement and create an app
setupSteps.body: Sign up for a free developer agreement at the e-conomic Developer Network, then log in and create a new app from the Apps tab.

setupSteps.title: Capture the App Secret Token
setupSteps.body: When you create the app, e-conomic generates an App Secret Token. Copy and store it securely, as it is shown only once. Use this value for the app_secret_token field.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an Agreement Grant Token
setupSteps.body: Share your app's installation URL with the e-conomic agreement owner and have them open it to grant your app access. e-conomic then issues an Agreement Grant Token for that agreement. Use this value for the agreement_grant_token field.

setupSteps.title: Enter both tokens in the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the App Secret Token in app_secret_token and the Agreement Grant Token in agreement_grant_token. The connector sends them as the X-AppSecretToken and X-AgreementGrantToken headers on each request to the e-conomic REST API.

sources.title: Connecting to the APIs using tokens - e-conomic
